ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "weather_state_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the weather state */,
  "weather_state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the weather state */,
  "wind_direction_compass" TEXT /* Compass direction of the wind */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "applicable_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data is applicable */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "the_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Speed of the wind */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Direction of the wind in degrees */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* Air pressure measured */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "predictability" INTEGER /* Predictability score of the weather data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation recorded */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Depth of snow on the ground */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or entity that owns the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., individual user, enterprise client, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the real-time weather data */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_min_temp" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature */,
  "predicted_max_temp" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature */,
  "predicted_temp" REAL /* Predicted average temperature */,
  "predicted_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed */,
  "predicted_wind_direction" REAL /* Predicted wind direction in degrees */,
  "predicted_air_pressure" REAL /* Predicted air pressure */,
  "predicted_humidity" INTEGER /* Predicted humidity percentage */,
  "predicted_visibility" REAL /* Predicted visibility in kilometers */,
  "predicted_weather_state_name" TEXT /* Predicted weather state name */,
  "predicted_weather_state_abbr" TEXT /* Predicted weather state abbreviation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the forecast location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the forecast location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the forecast location */,
  "predicted_precipitation" REAL /* Predicted amount of precipitation */,
  "predicted_cloud_cover" REAL /* Predicted percentage of cloud cover */,
  "predicted_uv_index" REAL /* Predicted UV index */,
  "predicted_snow_depth" REAL /* Predicted depth of snow on the ground */,
  "predicted_air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Predicted air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the real-time weather data */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the alert location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the alert location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the alert location */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert in hours */,
  "alert_area" TEXT /* Area or region covered by the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., rain, wind, temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "alert_preference" TEXT /* Preference for receiving weather alerts */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of weather updates */,
  "data_type_preferences" TEXT /* Types of weather data the user is interested in */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's preferred location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's preferred location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's preferred location */,
  "alert_radius" INTEGER /* Radius in kilometers for receiving alerts */,
  "preferred_units" TEXT /* Units for weather data (e.g., metric, imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
